dome_author_contact_note: Per HNOTE-OPERATOR-AUTHOR-CONTACT-CONFIRMED-001: dome author has made DM contact with operator. Updated prior: dome site changes that align in timing + content with recent review updates classified likely-responsive (bio-link chain establishes identity independently of DM content). Manual-commit drought consistent with author reading our review without feeling compelled to change — or with him working offline. PRED-105 silent-ignore at 9 days is notable: this is the prediction our review flags most prominently as unfalsifiable. Lack of response could indicate acknowledgment, or that the test window machinery is not triggering further attention.
